title: Master Adaptive Load Shedding
description: Architect dynamic concurrency limits based on principles like Little's Law. Implement automatic rejection of low-priority traffic during periods of system degradation. Design load shedding mechanisms to preserve system stability under extreme load conditions.
objectives: Architect dynamic concurrency limits based on principles like Little's Law.
Implement automatic rejection of low-priority traffic during periods of system degradation.
Design load shedding mechanisms to preserve system stability under extreme load conditions.
